violations.text: The blower fan in the walk-in freezer was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2026

The condensate from the ice machine refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other no sewage liquids must drain into a drain. The pipe on the ice machine must be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. CA - Establishment is to clean and sanitize ice machine, and send photo of cleaned ice machine to RIDOH before resuming use. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
